title: Follow-Up Tracker - Follow-Ups
description: Emails awaiting response and tracked promises managed by the Smart Follow-Up Tracker plugin. Created on first run via lazy DB creation.

Thread ID.description: Gmail thread ID for deduplication and linking back to the original email thread.

Subject.description: Email subject line for quick identification in the tracker.

Recipient.description: Primary recipient email address or name.

Sent Date.description: Date the original email was sent.

Days Waiting.description: Number of days since the email was sent without a reply. Recalculated on each /followup:check run.

Priority.description: Priority score 1-5. Based on age, relationship importance, and promise urgency. 5 = urgent, 1 = low.

Promise Type.description: Type of commitment detected in the email thread.

Nudge Count.description: Number of follow-up nudges sent for this thread. Incremented by /followup:nudge.

Last Nudge Date.description: Date of the most recent nudge email sent.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name before creating it (lazy creation). Thread ID serves as the unique key for idempotent updates — existing records are updated rather than duplicated on re-runs.
